breaking.title_zh: Anthropic承诺五年向谷歌云投入2000亿美元，深化AI合作
breaking.title_en: Anthropic Commits $200B to Google Cloud Over 5 Years in Landmark Deal
breaking.summary_zh: Anthropic签署协议承诺五年内向谷歌云支出2000亿美元，占谷歌云收入积压订单的40%以上。同时谷歌母公司Alphabet计划向Anthropic投资高达400亿美元。
breaking.summary_en: Anthropic commits to spend $200B with Google Cloud over five years, accounting for over 40% of Google's revenue backlog. Alphabet also investing up to $40B in the AI startup.

breaking.title_zh: iOS 27将允许用户选择Claude或Gemini替代ChatGPT
breaking.title_en: iOS 27 to Let Users Choose Claude or Gemini Instead of ChatGPT
breaking.summary_zh: 苹果iOS 27、iPadOS 27和macOS 27将允许用户将第三方AI服务设为Apple Intelligence默认选项，包括Claude和Gemini。苹果已与谷歌签署协议，计划使用基于Gemini的模型。
breaking.summary_en: Apple's iOS 27 will let users set third-party AI services like Claude or Gemini as default for Apple Intelligence features. Apple has signed a deal with Google for Gemini-based models.

daily.title_zh: Anthropic与OpenAI双双成立企业AI合资企业
daily.title_en: Anthropic and OpenAI Both Launch Enterprise AI Joint Ventures
daily.excerpt_zh: Anthropic宣布成立专注企业AI服务的合资企业，估值15亿美元，Blackstone等参与。数小时后OpenAI也宣布成立类似企业The Development Company，融资40亿美元。
daily.excerpt_en: Anthropic launches enterprise AI JV valued at $1.5B with Blackstone, Goldman Sachs. OpenAI follows hours later with The Development Company raising $4B at $10B valuation.

daily.title_zh: OpenAI发布GPT-5.5：多步骤推理与Agent编码大幅提升
daily.title_en: OpenAI Debuts GPT-5.5 with Agentic Coding and Research Gains
daily.excerpt_zh: GPT-5.5在多步骤工作、工具使用和自主验证方面显著改进。在Agent编码、计算机使用和早期科学研究方面取得进展。更token高效，API即将推出。
daily.excerpt_en: GPT-5.5 improves at multi-step work, tool use, and self-verification. Gains in agentic coding, computer use, and early-stage scientific research. More token-efficient.

daily.title_zh: ChatGPT Images 2.0发布：首个具备思考能力的图像模型
daily.title_en: OpenAI Launches ChatGPT Images 2.0 with Thinking Capabilities
daily.excerpt_zh: Images 2.0是OpenAI首个具备思考能力的图像模型，可遵循复杂指令、准确定位物体关系、渲染密集布局。支持2K分辨率、多语言和8图批量生成。
daily.excerpt_en: Images 2.0 is OpenAI's first image model with thinking capabilities. Follows detailed instructions, preserves fine detail, renders dense layouts. Supports 2K and 8-image batches.

daily.title_zh: 谷歌计划向Anthropic投资高达400亿美元
daily.title_en: Google Plans to Invest Up to $40 Billion in Anthropic
daily.excerpt_zh: 谷歌母公司Alphabet计划向Anthropic投资高达400亿美元，深化与这家AI初创公司的合作关系。此举将使谷歌成为Anthropic最重要的财务支持者之一。
daily.excerpt_en: Alphabet plans to invest up to $40B in Anthropic, deepening its partnership. This would make Google one of Anthropic's most significant financial backers.

daily.title_zh: OpenAI推出100美元/月Pro订阅：面向重度Codex用户
daily.title_en: OpenAI Adds $100/Month ChatGPT Tier for Heavier Codex Use
daily.excerpt_zh: OpenAI新增100美元/月Pro订阅，提供5倍于Plus计划的Codex使用量。Anthropic也有类似定价结构：20美元Pro、100美元Max 5x、200美元Max 20x。
daily.excerpt_en: OpenAI adds $100/month Pro tier with 5x more Codex usage than Plus. Anthropic offers similar tiers: $20 Pro, $100 Max 5x, $200 Max 20x.

daily.title_zh: Anthropic与OpenAI合同占全球云积压订单超半数
daily.title_en: Anthropic and OpenAI Contracts Account for Over Half of Global Cloud Backlog
daily.excerpt_zh: Anthropic和OpenAI与三大云厂商的合同占全球云积压订单（约2万亿美元）的一半以上。Anthropic已签CoreWeave多年协议，并将通过Amazon芯片获得近1吉瓦算力。
daily.excerpt_en: Contracts involving Anthropic and OpenAI now account for over half of the $2T backlog at AWS, Azure, and GCP. Anthropic also struck deals with CoreWeave and Amazon.

daily.title_zh: Anthropic探索2026年IPO，年收入冲刺26亿美元
daily.title_en: Anthropic Eyes 2026 IPO with Revenue Run Rate Targeting $2.6B
daily.excerpt_zh: Anthropic正探索最早于2026年IPO，已聘请Wilson Sonsini。公司预计年化收入明年增至26亿美元，目前服务超30万企业客户。
daily.excerpt_en: Anthropic exploring 2026 IPO, hired Wilson Sonsini. Annualized revenue run rate projected to hit $2.6B next year. Currently serves 300K+ enterprise clients.

daily.title_zh: Anthropic承诺Claude永无广告，暗讽ChatGPT广告计划
daily.title_en: Anthropic Pledges Claude Will Remain Ad-Free, Mocks ChatGPT Ads
daily.excerpt_zh: Anthropic承诺Claude永远不会植入广告，称'对话不是广告的合适场所'。此举直接针对OpenAI计划在ChatGPT中引入广告的策略。
daily.excerpt_en: Anthropic promises Claude will remain ad-free: 'A conversation with Claude is not one of them.' Directly contrasts with OpenAI's planned ChatGPT ad integration.

AI合同占云积压订单半数
items.title_en: AI contracts half of cloud backlog
